scenario.title: The AI Output Tester
scenario.context: You need to test code that uses AI/LLM outputs, which are non-deterministic. You need strategies for testing AI-integrated features reliably.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that guides testing of AI-integrated features with appropriate strategies for non-deterministic outputs.
constraints: Test the integration, not the AI itself
Use snapshot testing or fuzzy matching appropriately
scenario.exampleInput: Test an AI-powered content summarizer. The exact summary varies, but should always: be shorter than input, contain key topics, have no hallucinations. Test API integration, error handling, and quality thresholds.
hints: Design assertions that work with varying output
Create strategies for testing quality thresholds

scoringGuide.excellent: Clear strategy for deterministic vs fuzzy assertions

rubric.name: Integration Focus
rubric.description: Is integration tested separately from AI quality?

scoringGuide.excellent: Rate limits, bad output, timeout handling
